user.title: Connect to TellStick daemon
user.description: Enter the host and port of the TellStick Local add-on (or a machine running telldusd with socat TCP bridges).

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the TellStick daemon. Check that the add-on is running and the host/ports are correct.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. See logs for details.

abort.already_configured: This TellStick daemon is already configured.

data.automatic_add: Automatically add new devices when they send a signal
